LAST_DONE: 2026-05-26 07:10 GMT+8 — Phase 8 Batch B sub-session 3 implementation complete; typecheck + lint + tests all green. Pending commit + push.

Files added (8 source + 4 test + 1 migration + 1 dep):
  - apps/web/src/lib/livekit/egress-client.ts — wraps `EgressClient.startRoomCompositeEgress` with `EncodedFileOutput` + `S3Upload` (forcePathStyle for MinIO). Normalises `wss://` LIVEKIT_URL → `https://` for the HTTP Egress API. Throws on missing env (config gap distinguished from auth failure by caller).
  - apps/web/src/lib/livekit/egress-client.test.ts — 5 cases (happy path + missing LIVEKIT_API_KEY + missing STORAGE_BUCKET + wss→https URL normalisation + stopRoomEgress).
  - apps/web/src/lib/livekit/webhook-verify.ts — wraps `WebhookReceiver.receive(rawBody, authHeader)`. Returns `null` on auth failure (401-style), throws ONLY on missing config (503-style) so monitoring can distinguish.
  - apps/web/src/lib/livekit/webhook-verify.test.ts — 4 cases (happy path + missing auth header + invalid signature + missing API key).
  - apps/web/src/app/api/webhooks/livekit/route.ts — non-tRPC Route Handler. Mirrors xendit pattern: 503 on env-empty, 401 on auth failure, 200 + enqueue on valid event. Filters non-egress events (room_started etc.) with 200 + ignored. Deterministic jobId via `livekit-egress-{event_id || event_type:egress_id}` for queue-level idempotency.
  - apps/web/src/app/api/webhooks/livekit/route.test.ts — 6 cases (503 + 401 + 200 happy path + ignored non-egress + jobId composite fallback + 500 on enqueue failure).
  - apps/web/src/lib/livekit/egress-webhook-worker.test.ts — 7 cases (recording_not_found + no_op for non-terminal + happy egress_ended + already_ready idempotency + egress_failed + egress_ended-with-EGRESS_FAILED-status + already_failed idempotency). Tests the pure `processLiveKitEgressWebhookJob` exported from @yelli/jobs.
  - packages/jobs/src/workers/livekit-egress-webhook.ts — pure handler + BullMQ worker wrapper. Two-layer idempotency (jobId + DB state short-circuit). Uses `platformPrisma` (no tenant context at intake; org resolved from Recording.organization_id). Handles egress_started/updated (no-op), egress_ended success path (status=ready + file_size_bytes + duration_seconds + Meeting.recording_enabled=false), egress_ended-with-failure-status + egress_failed (status=failed + Meeting.recording_enabled=false). AuditLog every terminal transition.
  - packages/db/prisma/migrations/20260526070000_recording_egress_id/migration.sql — ALTER TABLE recordings ADD COLUMN egress_id TEXT + UNIQUE INDEX + DEFAULT 0 on file_size_bytes + duration_seconds (so Recording row can be inserted at egress-start time before the file exists).
  - apps/web/package.json — `livekit-server-sdk ^2.15.3`.

Files modified (4 source + 3 governance):
  - packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma — added `egress_id String? @unique` to Recording model + `@default(0)` on file_size_bytes (BigInt) + duration_seconds (Int).
  - packages/jobs/src/queues.ts — added `LiveKitEgressWebhookJob` envelope (NOT TenantJobBase) + `QUEUE_NAMES.livekitEgressWebhook` + `livekitEgressWebhookQueue` Queue instance (retry 3 + exponential backoff). Idempotency comment block mirrors xenditWebhookQueue.
  - packages/jobs/src/index.ts — exports `livekitEgressWebhookQueue` + `LiveKitEgressWebhookJob` type + `createLiveKitEgressWebhookWorker` + `processLiveKitEgressWebhookJob` + handler dep types.
  - apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/recordings.ts — added `start` and `stop` mutations. `start`: host check via `Meeting.host_user_id === ctx.user.id` (FORBIDDEN otherwise) + active CallLog precondition (PRECONDITION_FAILED if none) + double-start guard via Recording.findFirst status='processing' (CONFLICT) + buildStorageKey(orgId,'recordings','mp4') + startRoomCompositeRecording before any DB write (SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE on LiveKit failure, no orphan row) + atomic transaction (Recording.create + Meeting.recording_enabled=true + AuditLog CREATE). `stop`: host check + Recording.findFirst active + best-effort stopRoomEgress (warn on error, treat as already-stopped) + Meeting.recording_enabled=false + AuditLog UPDATE.
  - apps/web/src/server/trpc/routers/recordings.test.ts — NEW test file with 11 cases for start (happy + NOT_FOUND cross-tenant + FORBIDDEN non-host + PRECONDITION_FAILED no active call + CONFLICT existing + SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE on LiveKit failure with no DB row) + stop (happy + FORBIDDEN non-host + NOT_FOUND no active + best-effort stop on error).
  - apps/web/src/components/meeting/meeting-controls.tsx — added `isRecording` + `isRecordingActionPending` + `onStartRecording` + `onStopRecording` optional props. Record/Stop button rendered host-only; pulses red while recording. Display-gated AND server-enforced (host check in router).
  - apps/web/src/components/meeting/meeting-room.tsx — added `recordingLive` useState (initialised from `recordingEnabled` prop) + `startRecordingMutation` + `stopRecordingMutation` via `trpc.recordings.start/stop.useMutation` with toast feedback. `<InCallRecordingIndicator>` and `<MeetingControls>` both wired to live state. Mutations only enabled when `isHost`.
